# West End Athletic Club

West End Athletic Club is a boxing and fitness gym at 283 Bering Ave, Etobicoke,
Ontario M8Z 3A5 (Toronto's west end), founded by the Cappuccitti family in 2015.
It serves complete beginners through national-level competitors, with 11 programs
including youth boxing (ages 4–16), women's-only classes, beginner sparring, strength
& conditioning, and a competitive amateur fight team. Rated 4.9/5 on Google (117
reviews). Coaches include former national and North American champions. New members
can claim 3 free days. Hours: Mon–Thu 6am–9pm, Fri 6am–8:30pm, Sat 8am–3pm, Sun
9am–2pm. Free on-site parking. Phone: 416-621-1234. Email: info@westendac.com.

## Pages
- https://www.westendac.com/ — Home: overview, offer, community
- https://www.westendac.com/about — Story, mission, values, coaching staff and credentials
- https://www.westendac.com/classes — All 11 programs, who each suits, and how to start
- https://www.westendac.com/schedule — Full weekly timetable (36 classes/week)
- https://www.westendac.com/memberships — Pricing, youth rates, intro offers, and FAQ
- https://www.westendac.com/boxing-gym-etobicoke — Boxing gym in Etobicoke: location, programs, coaches, map, and FAQ
- https://www.westendac.com/youth-boxing-toronto — Youth boxing ages 4–16: Little Warriors, Youth Academy, pricing, and FAQ
- https://www.westendac.com/womens-boxing-toronto — Women's-only boxing: Box & Burn, Sculpt & Strong, supportive environment, and FAQ
- https://www.westendac.com/promo — Claim 3 free days (new members)
